task: I’m behind on a worksheet because my evening got disrupted, and I need to let my teacher know I won’t have it ready on time. What’s a simple way to explain that and ask what I should do next?

turns.agent_response:
You could say:

“Hi [Teacher’s Name], I’m sorry, but my evening got disrupted and I’m behind on the worksheet. I won’t have it ready on time. What would you like me to do next?”

If you want, I can also make it sound more formal or more casual.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Simple and honest. I’d probably send that.
